payload.answer: Inspection requested for memory ID mem_123, but no memory contents or metadata were provided in the fixture, so there is nothing to display or verify.

entity_resolution.reason: The command requests inspection of an existing memory by explicit memory ID; no entity resolution is needed.

details: Parsed command as an inspection request for memory ID mem_123.
No memory record payload was included, so no factual output can be produced.
No durable memory was created, modified, or deleted.

repair_options: Provide the stored contents or metadata for mem_123 to inspect it.
If mem_123 may be missing, verify that the memory ID exists in the backing store.
If you intended a different command, supply the target memory text or lookup context.
